text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 34 

HOP_ER_VISITS 

LABEL: Hospital Outpatient Emergency Room Visits 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the count of unique emergency department revenue center dates (as a proxy for an ED 
visit) in the hospital outpatient data file for the year. Revenue center codes indicating Emergency Room 
use were (0450, 0451, 0452, 0456, or 0459). 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: HOP_ER_VISITS
